channel.title: Purego on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Purego on Arrans github.io

item.title: ebitengine/purego
item.description: A library for calling C functions from Go without Cgo

item.title: hybridgroup/yzma
item.description: Go with your own intelligence - Go applications that directly integrate llama.cpp for local inference using hardware acceleration.
